steps.instruction: This protocol uses a single tip on the p300 multi-channel pipette to distribute custom volumes of buffer (150-300 uL) from a 195 mL reservoir to specified wells of a 96-well destination plate followed by transfer of custom volumes of sample (2-15 uL) from up to three 24-tube racks to specified wells in the destination plate (volumes, rack locations and well locations are specified in a csv file uploaded at the time of protocol download). Links: * [example input csv](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/04fed3/example.csv)
Use the p300 multi to distribute buffer from the reservoir to wells of the destination plate according to the uploaded csv file.
Use the p20 single to mix the sample source 6x, transfer sample to wells of the destination plate, and mix the destination well 3x according to the uploaded csv file.
